name: Brandied Cherry Clafouti
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Drained black or red cherries (preferably canned in water)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a nonreactive bowl, mix the drained cherries, brandy, and 1/3 cup of sugar. Let sit for 1 hour.
2. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C). Butter a 9-inch pie pan.
3. Place the flour in a medium bowl and make a well in the center.
4. Drain the cherries, reserving the liquid. Pour the liquid into a blender and add the remaining 1/3 cup sugar, milk, eggs, vanilla, allspice, lemon zest, and salt. Blend until smooth.
5. Pour the liquid mixture into the well in the flour and blend to a smooth batter.
6. Spread the cherries evenly over the prepared pan. Pour the batter over the fruit.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 5 minutes, then reduce the heat to 350°F (175°C) and bake an additional 45 to 50 minutes until the clafouti is puffy and golden. A sharp knife inserted into the center should come out clean.
8. Let cool before dusting with confectioners' sugar and serving warm.
Per serving: 216 calories, 5 gm protein, 38 gm carbohydrates, 3 gm fat, 84 mg cholesterol, 1 gm saturated fat, 80 mg sodium
